decisions.rationale: The observation refers to the First Avenue/Second Avenue corridor from South Ferry to 125th Street in Manhattan — same borough, same limits, same dual-avenue scope as the canonical record corridor_first-second-avenues-brt, which is the observation's own base_record_id. The observation's payload (corridor_name: 'First Avenue/Second Avenue', limits: 'South Ferry to 125th Street', borough: 'Manhattan', length: 8.5 mi) matches the registry record exactly. Since the closest match IS the observation's own base_record_id, the observation already resolves to that canonical record. No link to a different record is required.
